message:
feat(ftui-harness): add asciicast v2 session recording (bd-3dca)

Add AsciicastRecorder for recording terminal sessions in asciicast v2
format (NDJSON), compatible with asciinema-player:

- RecordConfig for session metadata (dimensions, title, env, idle limit)
- AsciicastRecorder with output/input event recording
- AsciicastLoader for parsing and iterating recorded events
- Full JSON escaping for control codes and invalid UTF-8
- 20 unit tests + 3 doc tests

Also closes bd-1fd9 (asciicast tests) and bd-31j8 (recorder implementation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
